strategic_capability_mapping.relationship: Lets a completed parent explicitly continue after controlled child tasks have completed by consuming bounded child completion summaries as runtime context.
Reuses task.run as the explicit parent continuation path without scheduler auto-dispatch or child auto-run behavior.
Provides a headless runtime transition from child materialization and explicit child completion into parent-side continuation.

questions.prompt: Can a completed parent task explicitly continue only after its controlled child tasks have completed?
Does the continuation context use bounded child completion summaries and final response previews instead of raw child data?
Are incomplete child tasks rejected before parent continuation starts?
Are non-controlled child tasks rejected by the parent join gate?
Does parent task.run avoid auto-running child tasks?
Does this phase avoid scheduler handoff, external workers, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, diagnostics RPCs, and workspace mutation paths?

answers.completed_child_join: Yes. Completed parent task.run enters parent join continuation only when all controlled child tasks are Completed and have completed agent-loop ledger evidence.
answers.bounded_child_context: Yes. The runtime passes child_completion_summaries built from bounded completion_summary_preview and final_response_preview values already used by inspection summaries.
answers.incomplete_child_rejection: Yes. A queued, running, failed, or cancelled child rejects parent join continuation before the parent status is updated to Running.
answers.non_controlled_child_rejection: Yes. The parent join gate revalidates child parent/source/handoff provenance against the parent handoff envelope before admitting continuation.
answers.no_auto_child_run: Yes. Parent task.run only inspects existing child completion state and does not invoke task.run for any child.
answers.safety_boundary: Yes. The phase adds no scheduler handoff, external worker, patch apply, direct workspace mutation path, service control, network bypass, diagnostics RPC, or process execution expansion.

exit_criteria: Completed parent task.run can perform parent join continuation after completed controlled child tasks are present.
Parent join continuation consumes child_completion_summaries built from bounded completion_summary_preview and final_response_preview.
Incomplete controlled child tasks reject parent join continuation before the parent status changes.
Non-controlled child tasks do not satisfy parent join continuation.
Parent task.run does not auto-run child tasks.

No raw child prompts, raw provider responses, raw file content, command strings, stdout, stderr, environment values, raw tool input objects, or serialized request bodies are added to parent continuation context.
Existing multi-candidate child materialization and duplicate prevention remain compatible.
Explicit controlled child task.run admission remains compatible.

No scheduler handoff, external worker, process exec expansion, network bypass, service control, patch apply, direct workspace mutation path, diagnostics wrapper RPC, or new blocked summary wrapper is added.
